themes.reasoning_notes: Loot ability specifically rewards discarding artifact cards by making Powerstones, pushing artifact-focused deckbuilding.
Its discard payoff creates Powerstone tokens, providing repeatable colorless mana acceleration for artifact-heavy decks.
Activated ability loots each turn, filtering cards and fueling the artifact-discard payoff.
